SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-18-2014 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HO, QUYNH IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT GUPTA, DEEPA THE CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF, SAY SIN HO, IS DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE. NO APPEARANCE BY THIS PLAINTIFF. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
